creator: steve.hobday@eyeble.net
text:
Created attachment 213328
Message Buf file

System crashed with FreeNAS-11.3-U1. Applied U2 update (as memory leak was fixed) and received another crash. The platform is a HP Proliant DL380 G6, 16GB, HP Smart Array P410i with 2 x 146GB Raid 1 (10k) and 6 x 600GB Raid 5 (15k). It did have 64GB when running absolutely fine as a ESXi 6.5 U3 host. I removed 48GB as not needed for FreeNAS host.
